title: Kings Island Opens
description: Kings Island officially opens to the public.

title: Coney Island Closes
description: Cincinnati's Coney Island amusement park closes operations before Kings Island opens.

title: Safari Area Opens
description: Area features a monorail travelling through an exotic animal habitat.

title: WinterFest Debuts
description: Kings Island launches its first WinterFest holiday event.

title: Wild Animal Habitat closes
description: Kings Island's exotic animal exhibit located in the original Safari area closes after 19 years.

title: Action Zone Debuts
description: Adventure Village(formerly Safari area) is rethemed into Action Zone.

title: Nickelodeon Splat City Opens
description: Kings Island's iteration of a kids-focused area with water playground; adjacent to Hanna-Barbera Land(1972).

title: FearFest debuts
description: Kings Island's annual late-season horror event (known as Halloween Haunt since 2007) begins.

title: Nickelodeon Universe Opens
description: Hanna-Barbera and Nickelodeon Central kids areas collectively renamed to Nickelodeon Universe.

title: Soak City Debuts
description: Kings Islands's water park is expanded and renamed to Soak City.

title: Camp Snoopy Opens
description: Camp Snoopy is the expansion/sub-area of Planet Snoopy.
